info.name: Hotel Booking API
info.description:
Full manual test suite — follows the guest booking flow end-to-end plus Admin use cases.

Setup:
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:5000`
2. Run requests in order within each folder.
3. The collection uses `pm.environment.set` to pass IDs between steps automatically.

exec: // Should succeed (customer email is already in DB)

item.name: GET /api/bookings/:id  – guest fetches own booking (no email guard)
POST /api/payments/deposit  – payment FAILED (stub)
item.description: Create a fresh pending booking first, then simulate a failed payment.

exec: // Booking was already confirmed above, so this may 409.
// To test a fresh fail: create a new booking first and paste its id here.

item.name: POST /api/bookings/:id/cancel  – cancel pending booking (no refund)
item.description: Create a fresh pending booking without paying deposit first, then cancel it.

exec: // If booking is already cancelled this returns 409 — that is expected.

item.name: POST /api/admin/bookings/:id/check-in
item.description: Requires a booking with status=confirmed. Use bookingId from a confirmed booking.

exec: pm.test('200 cancelled (or 404/409 if not found/already done)', () => {

item.name: 12 – Admin FE: Manage Bookings (PATCH/DELETE)
item.description: These endpoints return {success, data} format used by the Admin FE.

item.name: 15 – Bookings: List, Update, Delete & Drafts
item.description: Endpoints used by the booking management FE (GET all, PATCH, DELETE, drafts).

exec: // data can be null if no draft exists
